ksa_text: Skill in measuring and reporting data governance program effectiveness using maturity scores, policy compliance rates, issue resolution metrics, and stewardship participation rates.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting reviews of systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-S-005 (DG, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4257 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.426, nist_ai_rmf=0.423, nice=0.410) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DG domain KSA DG-S-005 excluded at composite 0.4257, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4257 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4257 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DG (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Financial Risk Specialist. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DG KSA with composite 0.4257 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-S-005 (DG, composite 0.4257) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4257 with signal across ddat=0.426, nist_ai_rmf=0.423, nice=0.410 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DG-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4257, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
